setup.title: Permissions required
setup.subtitle: Focus Retro needs the following permissions before it can work
setup.accessibility_why: Required to observe game notifications and control window focus via AXObserver.
setup.accessibility_note: Must be granted manually in System Settings — Focus Retro cannot request it automatically.
setup.screen_recording_why: Required to read window titles to detect which Dofus Retro characters are running.
